svg.title: AXON wrapper architecture — transpiler to Python and TypeScript with provider plugin layer
svg.desc: Structural diagram showing how AXON source code transpiles to Python or TypeScript, sits on a runtime layer, connects to provider plugins, and wraps the existing Python and JS ML ecosystem.
svg.text: Transpiler-first · plugin providers · full ecosystem access

g.text: agent · tool · prompt · flow · rag · memory
Uniform interface · swap providers in one line · local or cloud
No rewrite required · AXON generates idiomatic code that imports these

svg.text: TypeScript target = Phase 2 · unlocks browser, edge, and Node.js deployment
